[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001010 3
1 0001110 3
2 0111010 4
3 0001000 1
4 0001101 3
5 0000010 1
6 1101010 4
7 1100111 5

01 10 0001000 1 match 3
12 21 0001000 1 match 3
23 32 0001000 1 match 3
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0000010 1 match 5
56 65 1100010 3
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 0100000 1

02 20 0001000 1 match 3
13 31 0001000 1 match 3
24 42 0000000 a
35 53 0001000 1 match 3
46 64 0000010 1 match 5
57 75 0100000 1
60 06 1100001 3
71 17 0000000 a

03 30 0001001 2
14 41 0000010 1 match 5
25 52 0001000 1 match 3
36 63 0000101 2
47 74 0000000 a
50 05 1101000 3
61 16 0000010 1 match 5
72 27 0000000 a

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 0001010 2
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0000000 a
